title: Ariadne CAD Diff v1
description: A structured difference between two drawing states (typically before/after a cad_patch). before_ref and after_ref point at the two states (DWG paths or ariadne.dwg_graph_ir.v1 documents); changed_handles enumerates per-handle changes (added/removed/modified) keyed by the DWG handle (the IR's cross-engine join key); summary gives roll-up counts. The diff is computed by comparing IR/entity sets, so it is engine-neutral. additionalProperties true for extension.

patch_id.description: The cad_patch.v1 patch_id this diff measures, when the diff is patch-induced.

changed_handles.description: Per-handle change records. Each entry names the handle and the change kind; modified entries may carry a field-level delta.

added.description: Count of handles present only in after.

removed.description: Count of handles present only in before.

modified.description: Count of handles present in both but changed.

diagnostics.description: Diff self-report: which engine/IR produced before/after, warnings, and whether the comparison was exact (handle-keyed) or heuristic.

comparison_basis.description: handle = exact join on DWG handles (preferred); geometry = positional matching when handles are unstable; mixed = both.

kind.description: dwg = a DWG path; ir = an ariadne.dwg_graph_ir.v1 document; extract = a dwg_geometry_extract document.

fields.description: Field-level deltas for a modified entity.

field.description: Name of the changed field (e.g. layer, geometry.start, color_index).
